items.name: 滝泉Ⅱ遺跡出土遮光器土偶

en.name_romaji: Takiizumi Nigō Iseki Shutsudo Shakōki Dogū
en.name_en: Goggle-Eyed Clay Figurine Excavated from the Takiizumi II Site
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the archaeological materials category, a shakoki-dogu (goggle-eyed clay figurine) excavated from the Takiizumi II site. Village-designated by Tanohata Village on 2012-10-27. Located in Tanohata.
An intangible folk cultural property, a tori-mai (rooster dance) performing art. Village-designated by Tanohata Village on 1981-02-28.

items.name: チョウセンアカシジミ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A natural monument, the Chosen akashijimi (Korean hairstreak butterfly). Village-designated by Tanohata Village on 1973-07-14. Located throughout the village.
